sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_points (id UInt32, lon1 Float64, lat1 Float64, lon2 Float64, lat2 Float64);
UPDATE geo_points SET lat2 = 40.712776 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT greatCircleDistance(lon1, lat1, lon2, lat2) AS distance FROM geo_points;
SELECT id, greatCircleDistance(lon1, lat1, lon2, lat2) AS distance FROM geo_points WHERE distance > 100000;
